  • Uses of AttackResult in Model

    Methods in Model that return AttackResult
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    AttackResult
    RiskGameModel.attackTerritoryWithResult(int defenderID, int attackerID, int defendUnits, int attackUnits)
    Return the result of the attack If the attacker have more than 3 units, the fighting attacker units will reduce to 3 If the defender have more than 2 units, the fighting defender units will reduce to 2
